---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    number-sections: false
    page-layout: custom
---

```{=html}
<!-- ===================================================
     PASSWORD GATE — Curso IA · SLP 2026
     Cambia la contraseña en la constante PASSWORD abajo.
     localStorage key: curso_ia_slp_unlocked
=================================================== -->
<style>
  /* ---- Overlay backdrop ---- */
  #pw-overlay {
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    background: rgba(10, 22, 54, 0.80);
    backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
    -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
    z-index: 9999;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    animation: pw-fade-in 0.35s ease-out both;
  }
  #pw-overlay.pw-exit {
    animation: pw-fade-out 0.5s ease-in forwards;
    pointer-events: none;
  }
  @keyframes pw-fade-in {
    from { opacity: 0; }
    to   { opacity: 1; }
  }
  @keyframes pw-fade-out {
    from { opacity: 1; }
    to   { opacity: 0; }
  }

  /* ---- Card ---- */
  #pw-card {
    background: #ffffff;
    border-radius: 22px;
    box-shadow:
      0 32px 80px rgba(10, 22, 54, 0.32),
      0 0 0 1px rgba(39, 128, 227, 0.10);
    padding: 2.4rem 2.6rem;
    width: min(420px, 88vw);
    animation: pw-card-in 0.5s 0.1s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1) both;
  }
  @keyframes pw-card-in {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: scale(0.88) translateY(20px); }
    to   { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1)    translateY(0);    }
  }

  /* ---- Form section ---- */
  #pw-form { width: 100%; }

  #pw-eyebrow {
    font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.63rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.22em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: #2780e3;
    font-weight: 600;
    margin: 0 0 0.55rem;
  }
  #pw-title {
    font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif;
    font-size: 1.38rem;
    font-weight: 800;
    color: #1a365d;
    margin: 0 0 0.3rem;
    line-height: 1.22;
    border-bottom: none;
    padding-bottom: 0;
  }
  #pw-sub {
    font-family: 'Atkinson Hyperlegible', system-ui, sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.82rem;
    color: #64748b;
    margin: 0 0 1.4rem;
    line-height: 1.55;
  }

  /* ---- Input ---- */
  #pw-input {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 0.7rem 1rem;
    border: 1.5px solid #e2e8f0;
    border-radius: 10px;
    font-family: 'Atkinson Hyperlegible', system-ui, sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.92rem;
    color: #1a365d;
    background: #f8fafc;
    outline: none;
    box-sizing: border-box;
    display: block;
    transition: border-color 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s, background 0.15s;
    margin-bottom: 0.45rem;
  }
  #pw-input:focus {
    border-color: #2780e3;
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(39, 128, 227, 0.13);
    background: #fff;
  }
  #pw-input.pw-shake {
    border-color: #ef4444;
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.13);
    animation: pw-shake 0.38s ease-out;
  }
  @keyframes pw-shake {
    0%, 100% { transform: translateX(0); }
    18%      { transform: translateX(-7px); }
    36%      { transform: translateX(7px); }
    54%      { transform: translateX(-4px); }
    72%      { transform: translateX(4px); }
  }

  /* ---- Error message ---- */
  #pw-err {
    font-family: 'Atkinson Hyperlegible', system-ui, sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.75rem;
    color: #ef4444;
    margin: 0 0 0.65rem;
    height: 1.1em;
    opacity: 0;
    transition: opacity 0.15s;
  }
  #pw-err.show { opacity: 1; }

  /* ---- Button ---- */
  #pw-btn {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 0.74rem;
    background: #2780e3;
    color: #fff;
    border: none;
    border-radius: 10px;
    font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.93rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: background 0.15s, transform 0.12s, box-shadow 0.15s;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(39, 128, 227, 0.28);
  }
  #pw-btn:hover {
    background: #1a6fc4;
    transform: translateY(-1px);
    box-shadow: 0 5px 18px rgba(39, 128, 227, 0.38);
  }
  #pw-btn:active { transform: translateY(0); }

  /* ---- Flying favicon ---- */
  #pw-plane {
    position: fixed;
    top: 50%;
    left: 50%;
    width: 40px;
    height: 40px;
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 10000;
    margin: -20px 0 0 -20px;
    filter: drop-shadow(0 2px 10px rgba(39, 128, 227, 0.6));
    animation: pw-fly 10s linear infinite;
  }
  @keyframes pw-fly {
    0%   { transform: translate(-310px,   10px) rotate(-15deg) scale(1.05); }
    12%  { transform: translate(-220px, -175px) rotate(-50deg) scale(0.95); }
    25%  { transform: translate(   0px, -210px) rotate(  -5deg) scale(1.10); }
    38%  { transform: translate( 230px, -150px) rotate(  35deg) scale(0.95); }
    50%  { transform: translate( 310px,   10px) rotate(   5deg) scale(1.05); }
    62%  { transform: translate( 210px,  175px) rotate( -15deg) scale(0.95); }
    75%  { transform: translate(   0px,  210px) rotate( -35deg) scale(1.10); }
    88%  { transform: translate(-225px,  150px) rotate( -55deg) scale(0.95); }
    100% { transform: translate(-310px,   10px) rotate( -15deg) scale(1.05); }
  }

  @media (max-width: 600px) {
    #pw-plane { display: none; }
    #pw-card  { padding: 2rem 1.6rem; }
  }
</style>

<div id="pw-overlay">
  <!-- Favicon flying around the card -->
  <img id="pw-plane" src="assets/logo.svg" alt="">

  <div id="pw-card">
    <!-- Left: form -->
    <div id="pw-form">
      <p id="pw-eyebrow">Intro a la IA · SLP 2026</p>
      <h2 id="pw-title">Acceso al curso</h2>
      <p id="pw-sub">Ingresa la contraseña<br>para continuar.</p>
      <input id="pw-input" type="password" placeholder="Contraseña"
             autocomplete="current-password" spellcheck="false">
      <p id="pw-err">Contraseña incorrecta. Intenta de nuevo.</p>
      <button id="pw-btn">Entrar →</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
(function () {
  const KEY      = 'curso_ia_slp_unlocked';
  const PASSWORD = 'cursoia2026'; // ← cambia la contraseña aquí

  const overlay = document.getElementById('pw-overlay');
  const input   = document.getElementById('pw-input');
  const btn     = document.getElementById('pw-btn');
  const errEl   = document.getElementById('pw-err');

  /* Already unlocked → remove overlay immediately */
  if (localStorage.getItem(KEY) === 'true') {
    overlay.remove();
    return;
  }

  /* Auto-focus the input after card animates in */
  window.addEventListener('load', () => input.focus());

  function showError() {
    errEl.classList.add('show');
    input.classList.remove('pw-shake');
    void input.offsetWidth; // reflow to restart animation
    input.classList.add('pw-shake');
    input.value = '';
    input.addEventListener('animationend',
      () => input.classList.remove('pw-shake'), { once: true });
    input.focus();
  }

  function unlock() {
    if (input.value.trim() === PASSWORD) {
      localStorage.setItem(KEY, 'true');
      overlay.classList.add('pw-exit');
      overlay.addEventListener('animationend',
        () => overlay.remove(), { once: true });
    } else {
      showError();
    }
  }

  btn.addEventListener('click', unlock);
  input.addEventListener('keydown', e => { if (e.key === 'Enter') unlock(); });
})();
</script>
```

```{=html}
<style>
  /* ================================================
     LANDING PAGE — Curso IA · SLP
     Paleta coherente con tema Quarto Cosmo
  ================================================ */

  /* Reset body para la landing */
  body {
    background: #ffffff !important;
    color: #1a365d;
  }

  /* El navbar cosmo ya es blanco — solo refinamos */
  .navbar {
    border-bottom: 1px solid #e2e8f0 !important;
    box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);
  }

  .page-layout-custom {
    padding: 0 !important;
    max-width: 100% !important;
  }

  /* ---- HERO ---- */
  .lp-hero {
    position: relative;
    min-height: 88vh;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: #ffffff;
    text-align: center;
    padding: 5rem 1.5rem 6rem;
  }

  /* Canvas de red neuronal */
  #lp-canvas {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 0;
  }

  .lp-hero-content {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 10;
    max-width: 700px;
  }

  /* Animaciones de entrada escalonadas */
  .lp-eyebrow  { animation: lp-up 0.7s 0.1s ease-out both; }
  .lp-title    { animation: lp-up 0.7s 0.25s ease-out both; }
  .lp-subtitle { animation: lp-up 0.7s 0.42s ease-out both; }
  .lp-ctas     { animation: lp-up 0.7s 0.58s ease-out both; }

  @keyframes lp-up {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(22px); }
    to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
  }

  .lp-eyebrow {
    font-size: 0.71rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.2em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: #2780e3;
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
    font-weight: 600;
  }

  .lp-title {
    font-size: clamp(3rem, 8vw, 5.2rem);
    font-weight: 900;
    line-height: 1.06;
    margin-bottom: 1.4rem;
    color: #1a365d;
    letter-spacing: -0.025em;
  }

  .lp-title .lp-accent {
    background: linear-gradient(125deg, #2780e3 0%, #0ea5e9 100%);
    -webkit-background-clip: text;
    -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
    background-clip: text;
  }

  .lp-subtitle {
    font-size: clamp(1rem, 2.3vw, 1.18rem);
    color: #64748b;
    max-width: 440px;
    margin: 0 auto 2.6rem;
    line-height: 1.65;
  }

  .lp-ctas {
    display: flex;
    gap: 0.75rem;
    justify-content: center;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
  }

  .lp-btn-primary {
    background: #2780e3;
    color: #fff !important;
    padding: 0.82rem 2rem;
    border-radius: 6px;
    font-weight: 600;
    font-size: 1rem;
    text-decoration: none !important;
    display: inline-block;
    transition: background 0.15s, transform 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(39, 128, 227, 0.3);
  }
  .lp-btn-primary:hover {
    background: #1a6fc4;
    transform: translateY(-2px);
    box-shadow: 0 6px 18px rgba(39, 128, 227, 0.38);
    color: #fff !important;
    text-decoration: none !important;
  }

  .lp-btn-ghost {
    background: transparent;
    color: #1a365d !important;
    padding: 0.82rem 2rem;
    border-radius: 6px;
    font-weight: 600;
    font-size: 1rem;
    text-decoration: none !important;
    display: inline-block;
    border: 1.5px solid #cbd5e1;
    transition: border-color 0.15s, color 0.15s, transform 0.15s;
  }
  .lp-btn-ghost:hover {
    border-color: #2780e3;
    color: #2780e3 !important;
    transform: translateY(-2px);
    text-decoration: none !important;
  }

  /* Indicador scroll */
  .lp-scroll {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 1.8rem;
    left: 50%;
    transform: translateX(-50%);
    z-index: 10;
    opacity: 0.3;
    animation: lp-bounce 2.4s ease-in-out infinite, lp-up 1s 1s ease-out both;
  }
  .lp-scroll-line {
    width: 1px;
    height: 34px;
    background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #2780e3, transparent);
    margin: 0 auto;
  }
  @keyframes lp-bounce {
    0%, 100% { transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(0); }
    50%       { transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(7px); }
  }

  /* ---- STATS STRIP ---- */
  .lp-stats {
    background: #f0f7ff;
    border-top: 1px solid #dbeafe;
    border-bottom: 1px solid #dbeafe;
    padding: 2.8rem 1.5rem;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
  }

  .lp-stat {
    text-align: center;
    padding: 0.5rem 2.8rem;
  }

  .lp-stat + .lp-stat {
    border-left: 1px solid #dbeafe;
  }

  .lp-stat-num {
    display: block;
    font-size: 2.4rem;
    font-weight: 800;
    color: #2780e3;
    line-height: 1;
    margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
    letter-spacing: -0.03em;
    font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
  }

  .lp-stat-label {
    font-size: 0.71rem;
    color: #94a3b8;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.1em;
    font-weight: 500;
  }

  /* Mobile */
  @media (max-width: 580px) {
    .lp-stat + .lp-stat {
      border-left: none;
      border-top: 1px solid #dbeafe;
    }
    .lp-stat { padding: 1rem 2rem; width: 50%; }
  }
</style>

<!-- HERO -->
<section class="lp-hero">
  <canvas id="lp-canvas"></canvas>

  <div class="lp-hero-content">
    <p class="lp-eyebrow"> IA · México · 2026 </p>
    <h1 class="lp-title">
      Panorma de la IA<br>
      <span class="lp-accent">para EMS</span>
    </h1>
    <p class="lp-subtitle">
      Estudiala. Entiendela.<br>Úsala para tu desarrollo.
    </p>
    <div class="lp-ctas">
      <a href="sesiones/sesion-01.qmd" class="lp-btn-primary">Comenzar ahora →</a>
      
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="lp-scroll">
    <div class="lp-scroll-line"></div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- STATS CON COUNT-UP -->
<section class="lp-stats">
  <div class="lp-stat">
    <span class="lp-stat-num" data-target="15">0</span>
    <span class="lp-stat-label">Sesiones</span>
  </div>
  <div class="lp-stat">
    <span class="lp-stat-num" data-target="0">0</span>
    <span class="lp-stat-label">Sesiones en vivo</span>
  </div>
  <div class="lp-stat">
    <span class="lp-stat-num" data-target="0">0</span>
    <span class="lp-stat-label">Requisitos previos</span>
  </div>
  <div class="lp-stat">
    <span class="lp-stat-num">100%</span>
    <span class="lp-stat-label">En línea</span>
  </div>
</section>

<script>
/* ── Red neuronal animada en canvas ── */
(function () {
  const canvas = document.getElementById('lp-canvas');
  if (!canvas) return;
  const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

  const N = 42;          // partículas
  const LINK_DIST = 130; // distancia máxima de conexión
  const SPEED = 0.35;    // velocidad de movimiento

  let W, H, pts;

  function resize() {
    W = canvas.width  = canvas.offsetWidth;
    H = canvas.height = canvas.offsetHeight;
  }

  function rand(a, b) { return a + Math.random() * (b - a); }

  function make() {
    return {
      x:  rand(0, W),
      y:  rand(0, H),
      vx: rand(-SPEED, SPEED),
      vy: rand(-SPEED, SPEED),
      r:  rand(1.5, 3),
    };
  }

  function init() {
    resize();
    pts = Array.from({ length: N }, make);
  }

  function tick() {
    pts.forEach(p => {
      p.x += p.vx;
      p.y += p.vy;
      if (p.x < 0 || p.x > W) p.vx *= -1;
      if (p.y < 0 || p.y > H) p.vy *= -1;
    });
  }

  function draw() {
    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, W, H);

    /* conexiones */
    for (let i = 0; i < pts.length; i++) {
      for (let j = i + 1; j < pts.length; j++) {
        const dx = pts[i].x - pts[j].x;
        const dy = pts[i].y - pts[j].y;
        const d  = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
        if (d < LINK_DIST) {
          const a = (1 - d / LINK_DIST) * 0.13;
          ctx.beginPath();
          ctx.moveTo(pts[i].x, pts[i].y);
          ctx.lineTo(pts[j].x, pts[j].y);
          ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(39,128,227,${a})`;
          ctx.lineWidth = 1;
          ctx.stroke();
        }
      }
    }

    /* nodos */
    pts.forEach(p => {
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(p.x, p.y, p.r, 0, Math.PI * 2);
      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(39,128,227,0.22)';
      ctx.fill();
    });
  }

  function loop() { tick(); draw(); requestAnimationFrame(loop); }

  window.addEventListener('resize', () => {
    resize();
    pts = Array.from({ length: N }, make);
  });

  if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => { init(); loop(); });
  } else {
    init(); loop();
  }
})();

/* ── Count-up animado al entrar en pantalla ── */
(function () {
  function countUp(el) {
    const target = parseInt(el.dataset.target, 10);
    if (isNaN(target) || target === 0) return;
    const duration = 1400;
    const start = performance.now();
    function step(now) {
      const t = Math.min((now - start) / duration, 1);
      const ease = 1 - Math.pow(1 - t, 3); // cubic ease-out
      el.textContent = Math.round(ease * target);
      if (t < 1) requestAnimationFrame(step);
    }
    requestAnimationFrame(step);
  }

  const section = document.querySelector('.lp-stats');
  if (!section) return;

  const observer = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
    entries.forEach(e => {
      if (e.isIntersecting) {
        e.target.querySelectorAll('[data-target]').forEach(countUp);
        observer.unobserve(e.target);
      }
    });
  }, { threshold: 0.4 });

  observer.observe(section);
})();
</script>
```
